title: Defenders AMZ614 Pepper Dust 300g Pack of 2, Multicolour & Cat and Dog Scatter Granules 750g (Humane Treatment, Deterrent for Gardens, Covers Up to 250 sq m) - STV631
features: Deters cats, dogs and wildlife from digging, scratchng and fouling
Treats up to 10m squared in patio and garden areas
Natural, welfare friendly way to deter animals
Biodegradable deterrent granules coated with an effective natural active ingredient to humanely repel cats and dogs from gardens.
Treats up to 250 sq. m of outdoor, garden areas including patios, lawns, flower beds and seed beds.
Helps prevents cats and dogs from digging, scratching and fouling in outdoor, patio and garden areas.
Welfare-friendly cat and dog repellent to rid outdoor areas of garden pests.
description: From the manufacturer Caring control of pets & wildlife Part of Defenders cat, dog and wildlife control Keep your lawn, garden and outdoor areas free from unwanted pests with the comprehensive range of welfare-friendly and poison-free solutions from Defenders. Pepper Dust from Defenders – 300g - 2 Pack Welfare-friendly cat and dog training aid Pepper Dust from Defenders is a simple and effective way to help deter cats, dogs and wildlife from digging, scratching and fouling in garden areas. The ready-to-use Pepper Dust comes with an easy to use shaker and can be utilised all year round but is best suited for use in dry weather. Part of a comprehensive range of Defenders cat and dog repellent products. Use separately or in conjunction with the wide range of welfare-friendly cat & dog control from Defenders. Natural active ingredient. Helps prevent cats and dogs from digging, scratching and fouling. Easy-use shaker cap. Treats up to 10m² in patio and garden areas. Outdoor use only. Part of Defenders welfare friendly cat and dog control products. Product Highlights Welfare-Friendly Natural and welfare-friendly way to deter animals. Once used, dust naturally degrades without trace or harm. Coverage Each 300g shaker bottle can treat up to 10m2 in a patio or garden area. The ready-to-use Pepper Dust can be utilised all year round but is best suited for use in dry weather. It is recommended that the product is applied twice a week and after wet conditions or strong winds. Easy-to-Use The integrated shaker cap makes scattering the dust easy. Remove all evidence of previous fouling or damage. Spread pepper dust evenly (around a 30g per square metre) on and around areas needing full protection against cats & dogs. Cat and dog control The comprehensive cat, dog and wildlife range from Defenders works to protect your outdoor spaces. Choose from a range of welfare-friendly and poison-free solutions for every kind of down-the-garden problem. No harm, no fuss! STV631 Cat & Dog Scatter Granules - 750g Refill Product Highlights Welfare-Friendly Natural and welfare-friendly way to deter animals. Once used, granules naturally degrade without trace or harm. Large Coverage Each 750g refill pouch can treat up to 250m2 in a patio or garden area. The ready-to-use scatter granules can be utilised all year round but is best suited for use in dry weather. It is recommended that the product is applied twice a week and after wet conditions or strong winds. Easy-to-Use Cat and dog control The comprehensive cat, dog and wildlife range from The Big Cheese works to protect your outdoor spaces. Choose from a range of welfare-friendly and poison-free solutions for every kind of down-the-garden problem. No harm, no fuss!
